license: PD-1923 (public domain in the United States because it was published before January 1, 1931)
rights_holder: Edward Steichen (1879–1973). Public domain by age (pre-1929 publication).
attribution: Edward Steichen, *The Pond — Moonlight*, 1904 (Mamaroneck, New York). Hand-coloured platinum / gum bichromate print. Public domain.
subject: One of Steichen's most-celebrated early Pictorialist photographs and one of three known surviving prints. The Metropolitan Museum of Art holds one print; the Museum of Modern Art (NYC) holds another; the third is privately held. In February 2006 the privately-held print sold at Sotheby's for US$2.928 million — at the time a record price for any photograph at auction. The image was made on the property of art critic Charles Caffin near Mamaroneck, NY.
